name: Large apartment (Seline, Velebit coast)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Best value in the pricey Zadar/Paklenica zone (Jun 16): a whole 4-guest apartment in Seline at the foot of Velebit, walking distance to the sea and 10 min from the Paklenica trailheads. Entire home/apt, ★5.0, sleeps 4. Far better value than Zadar-city apartments (€80-170/night) or Starigrad seafront. Anchors the Plan-M Velebit morning.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★5.0 (Guest favorite signal in search). Entire home, sleeps 4, ~17 reviews. June nightly for 4 was the cheapest well-rated option in the whole Zadar→Paklenica box.
cost: ~€105/night for 4 (sampled Jun 16-18; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: A-2808-b apartment near beach (Jesenice/Omiš)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Cheapest ★5.0 in the Omiš/Cetina-canyon zone (Jun 17): a whole apartment a short walk from the beach at Jesenice, just east of Omiš town — ideal canyoning/rafting base. Entire home/apt, ★5.0, sleeps 4. On the Dalmatian coast in June this is genuinely rare value (most well-rated Omiš places run €150-280).
communityNotes: Airbnb ★5.0, entire home, sleeps 4. One of very few coast listings near the €50-80 benchmark for 4 in mid-June.
cost: ~€68/night for 4 (sampled Jun 17-19; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Modern apartment with sea view *Esthi* (Omiš)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Omiš zone (Jun 17): modern sea-view apartment above the town, ★4.96 Guest favorite, sleeps 4. Walkable to the old town and the Cetina river mouth where the canyoning/zipline operators launch. Strong value for the coast in June.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.96, Guest favorite, entire home, sleeps 4. Sea view; one of the better-value well-rated Omiš options.
cost: ~€77/night for 4 (sampled Jun 17-19; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Žižula cozy two-bedroom with terrace (Omiš)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Omiš zone (Jun 17): a perfect-rated two-bedroom with a real terrace, ★5.0 Top guest favorite, sleeps 4. A touch above benchmark but a step up in space/quality for the canyoning night; its sibling Žižula II (★5.0, Superhost) is an identical fallback nearby.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★5.0, Top guest favorite. Two bedrooms + terrace, sleeps 4. Twin listing Žižula II (id 41710780) is the same product if this one is booked.
cost: ~€109/night for 4 (sampled Jun 17-19; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Apartment Soldan 3 (Makarska)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Makarska Riviera zone (Jun 17 alternative): the cheapest well-rated entire apartment in central Makarska, ★4.96 Guest favorite, sleeps 4. Riviera base under the Biokovo massif for the Sveti Jure / Punta Rata side of the day. Good value for a notoriously pricey June coast.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.96, Guest favorite, sleeps 4. Cheapest well-rated Makarska option that surfaced for June (most run €110-280).
cost: ~€87/night for 4 (sampled Jun 17-19; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: dorotea 1 (Makarska)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Makarska Riviera (Jun 17 alternative): a near-flawless ★4.99 Top-guest-favorite two-bedroom, sleeps 6 (so comfortable for 4). Central Makarska, walk to the promenade and beaches. The standout-rated Makarska gem if you'll pay a bit more than Soldan.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.99, Top guest favorite, personCapacity 6. One of the highest-rated apartments anywhere on the Riviera.
cost: ~€111/night for 4 (sampled Jun 17-19; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Mlinica — converted watermill cottage (Brijesta, Pelješac)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. UNIQUE PROPERTY: a restored stone 'mlinica' (watermill) cottage with a jacuzzi at Brijesta on the quiet NW tip of Pelješac, near the Mljet ferry approach. ★4.91 Superhost, sleeps 5. A genuine character stay for the Mljet/Pelješac night — not a generic apartment.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.91, Superhost, 'Cottages' category, personCapacity 5, ~65 reviews. Old watermill + jacuzzi; secluded bay village.
cost: ~€155/night for 4 (sampled Jun 20-22; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Roberto Apartment (Ston/Pelješac base)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Pelješac value pick (Jun 20): a whole ★5.0 apartment near the Ston end of the peninsula — handy for the Ston walls + Mali Ston oysters + Dingač wine stops before/after Mljet. Entire home/apt, sleeps 4. Cheapest perfect-rated option on the peninsula for June.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★5.0, Guest favorite, entire home, sleeps 4. Best value on Pelješac that surfaced for the sample dates.
cost: ~€98/night for 4 (sampled Jun 20-22; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Mljet sunrise apartment (Sobra, Mljet)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Mljet island (Jun 20) — a THIN, pricey market (only ~8 listings surfaced island-wide). This Superhost apartment near Sobra, where the car ferry lands, is the cheapest well-rated option for the on-island overnight. ★4.9, Superhost. NOTE: listed sleeping capacity is tight (2+2) — verify it genuinely sleeps 4 before booking.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.9, Superhost. Mljet has very few entire-home listings and they fill early; this was the cheapest decent one for June. Confirm 4-person capacity (titled 'for 2+2').
cost: ~€99/night for 4 (sampled Jun 20-22; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Seaview apartment Rotim (Sutmiholjska, Mljet)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Mljet island (Jun 20): a ★4.95 Guest-favorite sea-view apartment near Sutmiholjska bay on the south coast, sleeps 4 (verified personCapacity 4). The highest-rated entire-home that surfaced on Mljet — book early, the island market is thin.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.95, Guest favorite, personCapacity 4. Sea view; among the best-rated of the handful of Mljet entire-homes available in June.
cost: ~€140/night for 4 (sampled Jun 20-22; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Apartment NN (Trebinje)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Trebinje (airport-pickup night Jun 18 + final night Jun 27): a perfect-rated whole apartment in the cheapest good zone of the whole trip, 58 min from Dubrovnik airport. ★5.0 Top guest favorite, 3 bedrooms, sleeps 4+. Outstanding value for celebrating the pickup or the last night.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★5.0, Top guest favorite. 4 beds / 3 bedrooms, sleeps 4+. Trebinje is a buyer's market (many great options <€55) — this is one of the very best.
cost: ~€49/night for 4 (sampled Jun 18-19; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Niksin san (Trebinje)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Trebinje (Jun 18 / Jun 27): a ★4.96 Top-guest-favorite two-bedroom in the old-town quarter by the Trebišnjica river, sleeps 4. Walk to Trebinje's Ottoman bridge and evening square. Excellent value runner-up to Apartment NN.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.96, Top guest favorite. 3 beds / 2 bedrooms, sleeps 4. Central, near the riverside old town.
cost: ~€53/night for 4 (sampled Jun 18-19; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Apartments Ena 1 — peaceful near river (Trebinje)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Trebinje budget gem (Jun 18 / Jun 27): a quiet whole apartment near the Trebišnjica, ★4.79 Superhost, 4 beds, sleeps 4. The cheapest of the Trebinje picks — proof of how cheap this zone is. A calm base after the airport run.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.79, Superhost. 4 beds / 1 bedroom, sleeps 4. Quiet riverside spot; the rock-bottom price in a famously cheap zone.
cost: ~€43/night for 4 (sampled Jun 18-19; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Nana's House — whole house with private yard (Mostar)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. BEST-VALUE GEM OF THE TRIP. An ENTIRE private house with its own yard in central Mostar for ~€40/night for 4 — ★5.0, sleeps 4, walkable to the Old Bridge. A whole house with outdoor space at apartment-room prices is exceptional; book early, this kind of value disappears first.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★5.0, 'Houses' category, personCapacity 4, entire house + private yard. ~€40/night for 4 in central Mostar is the single best price-to-product on the whole hunt.
cost: ~€40/night for 4 (sampled Jun 21-22; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: City Center Apartments #3 — terrace (Mostar)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Mostar (Jun 21): a ★4.97 Top-guest-favorite apartment with a private terrace, steps from the Old Town and the Kriva Ćuprija pocket — perfect for the softly-lit 21:00 Old Bridge that is the overnighter's reward. Entire home/apt, sleeps 4.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.97, Top guest favorite, personCapacity 4. Private terrace; right by the Old Town.
cost: ~€103/night for 4 (sampled Jun 21-22; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Zara — near the Old Town, terrace (Mostar)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Mostar (Jun 21) upgrade pick: a ★4.95 Top-guest-favorite two-bedroom right by the Old Town with a terrace and 3 ACs (useful in 30-35 °C Herzegovina heat), sleeps 4. Roomier than the budget options for a group that wants space.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.95, Top guest favorite. 4 beds / 2 bedrooms, sleeps 4. Terrace + strong cooling; minutes from the Old Bridge.
cost: ~€138/night for 4 (sampled Jun 21-22; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Studio Apartment with Lake View (Lisičići, Konjic)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Konjic / Neretva-rafting night (Jun 22): the cheapest perfect-rated option in the zone — a whole studio overlooking Jablaničko Lake at Lisičići, ★5.0 Superhost, sleeps 4. Konjic usually runs €65+, so a lake-view ★5.0 at this price is a standout.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★5.0, Superhost, entire home, personCapacity 4, ~35 reviews. Lake view; the value floor of an otherwise pricey rafting-night zone.
cost: ~€46/night for 4 (sampled Jun 22-23; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Apartment Konjic (central)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Konjic (Jun 22): a ★5.0 Top-guest-favorite whole apartment in central Konjic, sleeps 4 (verified). Walkable to the old Ottoman bridge and rafting-operator meeting points. The in-town perfect-rated pick if you'd rather sleep by the river than the lake.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★5.0, Top guest favorite, personCapacity 4, ~24 reviews. Central, near the historic bridge and Neretva.
cost: ~€66/night for 4 (sampled Jun 22-23; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Apartman Biber Deluxe (Sarajevo old town)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Sarajevo overnight (Jun 22, +13 min driving per the digest): a ★5.0 whole place in the Baščaršija old-bazaar quarter, 5 beds / sleeps 5 — roomy for 4 and walkable to ćevapi, the Trebević cable car base, and the best night out of the Balkans leg. Strong value for a perfect rating in the heart of town.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★5.0, 'Houses' category, personCapacity 5, ~over 50 reviews. Old-town location near Baščaršija.
cost: ~€61/night for 4 (sampled Jun 22-23; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Apartman Emir (Sarajevo)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Sarajevo (Jun 22): a ★5.0 whole apartment, 5 beds / sleeps 5, central and walkable. Another perfect-rated, well-priced Sarajevo gem alongside Biber — the city is a thick market so you have good options, but these two top it on rating-for-price.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★5.0, personCapacity 5, ~54 reviews. Central Sarajevo; great rating-to-price.
cost: ~€68/night for 4 (sampled Jun 22-23; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Kapa Apartment (Sarajevo)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Sarajevo (Jun 22) upgrade pick: a near-flawless ★4.99 Top-guest-favorite two-bedroom on the slopes just above the old town, sleeps 4-6. Pricier than Biber/Emir but the highest-rated Sarajevo gem — for a group that wants a designer flat with a view over the city.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.99, Top guest favorite. 3 beds / 2 bedrooms, sleeps 4+. Elevated old-town-edge location.
cost: ~€135/night for 4 (sampled Jun 22-23; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Mountain spark — Durmitor cabin (Žabljak)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Žabljak / Durmitor (2 nights, Jun 23-24). UNIQUE PROPERTY: a wooden mountain CABIN, ★4.93 Guest favorite, 4 beds, personCapacity 6 — roomy for 4. Cabin character + best rating-for-price in Žabljak, a base for the Black Lake / Veliki Međed trailheads. Book the Durmitor nights first — the cheap end fills first in high season.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.93, Guest favorite, 'Cabins' category, personCapacity 6, ~44 reviews. Wooden cabin near Žabljak; the value+character pick for the 2 Durmitor nights.
cost: ~€82/night for 4 (sampled Jun 23-25, 2-night stay; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: House maslacak (Žabljak)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Žabljak / Durmitor (Jun 23-24): a ★4.97 Top-guest-favorite house with parking on the quiet west side of Žabljak, sleeps 4-6. Near-flawless rating and well-priced for a high-season mountain town; a calm whole-house base between hikes.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.97, Top guest favorite. 3 beds / 2 bedrooms + parking, sleeps 4+. One of the highest-rated Žabljak homes for June.
cost: ~€94/night for 4 (sampled Jun 23-25, 2-night stay; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: A-frame Durmitor (Uskoci, Žabljak)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. UNIQUE PROPERTY: a standalone A-FRAME cabin in the Durmitor highlands (Uskoci), ★5.0, an Airbnb 'House'. The trip's most photogenic mountain stay — but CAPACITY IS EXACTLY 4 (no spare bed) and it's the priciest Žabljak pick, so it's the splurge/treat option for the 2 Durmitor nights, not the value pick.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★5.0, 'Houses' category, personCapacity 4 (sleeps exactly 4). Iconic A-frame; books out — grab early if you want the splurge.
cost: ~€164/night for 4 (sampled Jun 23-25, 2-night stay; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Ethno house Bajka (Njegovuđa, Durmitor)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. UNIQUE PROPERTY: a traditional Montenegrin ethno (timber) house at Njegovuđa on the high plateau east of Žabljak, ★4.75, sleeps 4. Rustic katun-style character right on the Durmitor ring road — the 'meditation on a mountain' vibe. Rating a touch lower than the in-town picks; choose it for the atmosphere, not the polish.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.75. Traditional ethno timber house on the Durmitor plateau. 3 beds / 2 bedrooms, sleeps 4. Character over convenience (it's outside Žabljak town).
cost: ~€152/night for 4 (sampled Jun 23-25, 2-night stay; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Orahovo cottages — koliba 1 (Virpazar, Skadar Lake)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. UNIQUE PROPERTY: a traditional stone 'koliba' (cottage) at Orahovo by Virpazar on Skadar Lake, ★4.87 Guest favorite, sleeps 4 — and excellent value. Genuine lake-village character (not a town apartment) right where the kayak + Pavlova Strana + winery half-day launches. The value champion for the Skadar night.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.87, Guest favorite, 'Cabins' category, personCapacity 4, ~119 reviews. Stone village cottage at Virpazar; ~€48/night for 4 is outstanding for a lakeside gem.
cost: ~€48/night for 4 (sampled Jun 25-26; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Cloud 9 Apartment (Ljajkovići, NE Skadar)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Skadar Lake (Jun 25): a near-flawless ★4.99 whole house above the lake's NE shore near Rijeka Crnojevića/Ljajkovići, sleeps 4. Quiet hillside lake-view setting and great value — a top-rated alternative to the Virpazar cottages if you want the dramatic Pavlova Strana side.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.99, 'Houses' category, personCapacity 4. Lake-view hillside near Rijeka Crnojevića; high rating at a low price.
cost: ~€51/night for 4 (sampled Jun 25-26; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Above the Lake (Bobija, Skadar/Cetinje)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Skadar Lake upgrade pick (Jun 25): a ★4.99 whole HOUSE on the Cetinje-side ridge above the lake near Rijeka Crnojevića, sleeps 4. A standout-rated lake-view house for the group that wants the panorama over a town apartment. Pricier than the koliba but a true view gem.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.99, 'Houses' category, personCapacity 4. Elevated Skadar lake view near Rijeka Crnojevića / the Pavlova Strana horseshoe bend.
cost: ~€116/night for 4 (sampled Jun 25-26; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Apartman Boljević (Dodoši, Skadar Lake)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Skadar Lake (Jun 25): a much-loved ★4.96 whole apartment near Dodoši on the NE shore (~262 reviews — very proven), 4 beds, sleeps 4-5. Excellent value and the most-reviewed lake gem of the set, near the Rijeka Crnojevića viewpoints and boat launches.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.96, ~262 reviews, personCapacity 5. One of the most-reviewed (proven) lakeside listings; strong value.
cost: ~€58/night for 4 (sampled Jun 25-26; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Apartment Got it (Budva)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Budva / coast (night-out night, Jun 26): a ★4.94 Guest-favorite whole apartment, sleeps 5, walkable to the old town and beach. Good value for Budva (which runs cheaper and livelier than Kotor) on the big-night-out evening.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.94, Guest favorite, personCapacity 5. Central Budva; solid value for the party night.
cost: ~€98/night for 4 (sampled Jun 26-27; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: The House Rooms — Family Suite (Budva)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Budva (Jun 26): a ★5.0 whole family-suite with free parking (rare and valuable in Budva), sleeps 4. Perfect rating and parking sorted for the car — a clean, central pick for the coast night.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★5.0, Guest favorite, free parking, 3 beds / 1 bedroom, sleeps 4. Parking is a real plus in central Budva.
cost: ~€105/night for 4 (sampled Jun 26-27; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Danilo i Filip (Risan, Kotor Bay)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Kotor Bay (final-area night, Jun 27): a ★4.94 Guest-favorite whole apartment at Risan on the quiet inner bay (the Perast/Risan side), 4 beds, personCapacity 6 — roomy and the best value in a zone with a €70+ floor. A bay-front sleep with the Kotor fortress an easy early-morning drive away.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.94, Guest favorite, personCapacity 6. Inner Bay of Kotor at Risan (near Perast); best value in the pricey Kotor zone.
cost: ~€94/night for 4 (sampled Jun 27-28; dates are route estimates, not final)

name: Glosy Apartment (Dobrota, Kotor)
description: Dedicated Airbnb gem hunt. Kotor Bay (Jun 27): a ★4.91 Top-guest-favorite two-bedroom at Dobrota, on the waterfront just north of Kotor old town, sleeps 4. Walkable/short drive to the fortress climb (do it before ~8am, free + cool + empty). A well-rated bayfront pick if you want to be right by Kotor rather than across the bay.
communityNotes: Airbnb ★4.91, Top guest favorite, personCapacity 4. Dobrota waterfront, minutes from Kotor old town and the fortress trail.
cost: ~€116/night for 4 (sampled Jun 27-28; dates are route estimates, not final)
